title: ZX Series
seoTitle: ZX Series Retro Arcade Games | BarkinMad Studios

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZXSnake, ZXBrick, ZXSpace and ZXPong

description: Discover the BarkinMad Studios ZX Series: a growing collection of connected retro-inspired arcade games featuring shared achievements, BarkinMad Coins, leaderboards, multiplayer, and future releases.
intro: The [ZX Series](/zx-series) is a growing collection of connected retro-inspired arcade games created by BarkinMad Studios.
Play across multiple ZX games, build your progress, unlock rewards, and keep chasing higher scores as the series continues to grow.
Earn BarkinMad Coins, unlock achievements, compete on leaderboards, and challenge friends through local and online PVP modes.
overview: The ZX Series brings together a collection of retro-inspired arcade games designed for iPhone and iPad. Every game is easy to pick up and play while offering modern features such as achievements, leaderboards, localisation, multiplayer, and shared progression.

Inspired by the golden age of arcade gaming and classic home computers, the series captures the fast-paced, score-chasing gameplay that made those games memorable while adapting it for today's mobile devices.
Current titles include [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), with more games planned as the series continues to expand.

sharedSystems.title: Shared Game Systems
sharedSystems.intro: Supported ZX Series games, including [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), share achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, multiplayer systems, and future cross-game features.
description: The ZX Series is designed as a connected gaming experience rather than a collection of separate titles. Shared systems allow players to build progress, earn rewards, unlock achievements, and compare scores across multiple games.
As new games are released, they benefit from the same proven foundation, including wallet support, achievements, leaderboards, localisation, Game Center integration, and multiplayer features.
achievementsDescription: Achievements give players new goals beyond simply reaching a high score. Alongside game-specific achievements, the ZX Series also rewards players for exploring and progressing across multiple titles.
Every achievement contributes towards building a connected arcade experience that grows with the series.
leaderboardsDescription: Leaderboards are at the heart of every great arcade game. Each title includes its own competitive rankings while shared leaderboards let players compare progress across the wider ZX Series.
The long-term vision is to make every score count, whether you're mastering a single game or playing the entire collection.
coinsDescription: [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) are earned by playing supported BarkinMad Studios games.
Coins unlock cosmetic rewards such as themes, colours, skins, and other visual customisation options without affecting gameplay balance.
Coins have no cash value, cannot be transferred, and cannot be exchanged for real-world goods or services.
pvpDescription: Supported ZX games include multiplayer modes alongside traditional solo play.
Whether competing with friends at home or challenging players online, multiplayer is designed to be quick to join, easy to understand, and fun to replay.
localPVPDescription: Local PVP makes it easy to play with friends or family on the same network, creating fast competitive matches without complicated setup.
It's ideal for short arcade sessions where anyone can pick up and play.
worldPVPDescription: World PVP extends the competition beyond your local network, allowing players to compete online from different locations.
As the ZX Series grows, online multiplayer will continue to evolve alongside every new release.
roadmapDescription: The ZX Series roadmap focuses on expanding both the number of games and the shared systems that connect them.

Released games provide the foundation, titles currently in development continue to grow the ecosystem, and future games will introduce new arcade experiences while building on the same connected platform.

sections.heading: Current and Upcoming Games
paragraphs: [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace) and [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong) represent the next stage of the ZX Series.
[ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace) is a fast-paced arcade space shooter featuring enemy waves, power-ups, score chasing, achievements, and shared progression.
[ZXPong](/apps/zxpong) reimagines the arcade classic with AI opponents, multiplayer, achievements, and connected ZX Series features.

sections.heading: Future ZX Games
paragraphs: Future ZX Series titles will explore new arcade-inspired gameplay styles while continuing to build on the shared systems that connect every game.
Current plans include ZXMaze, ZXRacer, ZXTank, and ZXLabrador, with dedicated pages added as development progresses.

sections.heading: Why the ZX Series Exists
paragraphs: The ZX Series was created to combine the simplicity of classic arcade games with the features players expect from modern mobile gaming.
Fast gameplay, clear objectives, replayability, achievements, leaderboards, multiplayer, and shared progression all work together to create games that are easy to learn but rewarding to master.
Every title is designed to stand on its own while contributing to a larger connected arcade ecosystem.

sections.heading: A Connected Arcade Ecosystem
paragraphs: Rather than treating every game as a separate experience, the ZX Series encourages players to build progress across the collection.
Earn rewards, unlock achievements, compare scores, and carry your progress between supported games.
Every new release strengthens the ecosystem, giving players more reasons to return and discover something new.
